overall_goal: Climb from the bottom platform to the child at the top by repeatedly choosing a ladder that is reachable from the current platform, traversing to it, climbing it, and dismounting safely while avoiding monkeys and coconuts.

skills.name: select_reachable_ladder
skills.purpose: Pick a target ladder whose bottom is on the same platform as the player's feet and whose top is above the player.
activation_conditions: Player is not currently inside a ladder column (no significant x-overlap with any active ladder).
At least one active ladder exists with abs((ladder_y+ladder_h) - (player_y+player_h)) < reach_y_tol AND ladder_y < player_y.
completion_signals: A target ladder index is chosen and persisted as the current sub-goal.
abs(player_center_x - ladder_center_x[target]) decreases over consecutive steps.
reward_terms: +w_select if a reachable ladder is selected (bottom near player feet, top above player)
-w_bad_select if the selected ladder fails the reach-y test (e.g., higher-platform ladder)
+w_persist for keeping the same target ladder while still reachable (avoid oscillation)
anti_shortcuts: Selecting the ladder with smallest |dx| ignoring reach-y test.

skills.name: traverse_to_ladder
skills.purpose: Move horizontally along the current platform toward the selected ladder's center x while preserving the proven first-reward RIGHTFIRE branch when a near monkey threatens.
activation_conditions: Player is on a platform (no x-overlap with target ladder column above overlap_frac).
completion_signals: Player x-overlap fraction with target ladder >= overlap_frac.
reward_terms: +w_dx_progress * max(0, prev_abs_dx - cur_abs_dx) bounded by step_cap
+w_punch_branch if a monkey is close ahead in player_orientation direction and FIRE-direction action is issued (preserves stable-200 punch)
-w_wrong_dir if action moves away from target_ladder_center_x without hazard justification
anti_shortcuts: Standing still and farming punches on lower-platform monkeys with zero UP actions.
Reversing direction repeatedly to accumulate dx_progress.

skills.name: climb_ladder
skills.purpose: Issue UP (or UPFIRE if a coconut/monkey is directly above) while inside the target ladder column until near its top.
activation_conditions: Player x-overlap fraction with target ladder >= overlap_frac (parametric, not 1-pixel).
Player is not currently airborne from a jump arc.
reward_terms: +w_climb * max(0, prev_player_y - cur_player_y) bounded by climb_cap
+w_reach_top when player_y within dismount_tol of ladder_top_y[target]
-w_fall if player_y increases by more than fall_tol while skill active
anti_shortcuts: Treating any 1-pixel x-overlap as 'on ladder' and issuing UP off-ladder.
Holding UP forever even after reaching the top.

skills.name: dismount_and_replan
skills.purpose: After reaching a ladder top, step horizontally onto the new platform and clear the target so a new ladder can be selected.
activation_conditions: Skill climb_ladder produced near_ladder_top within last few steps.
Player x-overlap with target ladder still high but player_y near ladder_top_y[target].
completion_signals: Player x-overlap fraction with previous target ladder < overlap_frac.
Player feet y matches a new platform's top y within platform_y_tol.
Target ladder reset to none so select_reachable_ladder runs again.
reward_terms: +w_dismount when overlap drops below overlap_frac while player_y stays near new platform
+w_new_select when a new reachable ladder above is selected after dismount
-w_redescend if player goes back down the same ladder
anti_shortcuts: Stalling at the ladder top (the post-200 failure mode).
Re-entering the same ladder repeatedly to harvest climb reward.

skills.name: avoid_hazards
skills.purpose: React to nearby active monkeys, thrown coconuts, and falling coconuts with punch or sidestep, without abandoning vertical progress.
activation_conditions: Any active monkey with |mx-player_x|<hazard_dx and |my-player_y|<hazard_dy, OR
falling_coconut_active and |falling_coconut_x-player_x|<coconut_dx and falling_coconut_y between player_y-coconut_dy_above and player_y+coconut_dy_below, OR
any active thrown coconut within hazard_dx, hazard_dy of player.
completion_signals: Hazard no longer satisfies activation thresholds.
Player still on intended platform (player_y change within fall_tol).
reward_terms: +w_punch when FIRE issued in player_orientation toward an in-range monkey
+w_sidestep when horizontal action moves player out of falling_coconut_x band
-w_hit_proxy when hazard remains within tight inner band for >hit_frames consecutive steps
anti_shortcuts: Punching repeatedly with no monkey in range (punch farming).
Sidestepping so far that the player leaves the ladder approach lane.

skills.name: approach_child
skills.purpose: Once on the topmost reachable platform, walk toward child_x to trigger rescue.
activation_conditions: abs((child_y) - (player_y)) < top_band_tol (player is on the child's platform tier).
No reachable upward ladder from current platform.
completion_signals: Episode reward jump occurs (handled by env, not invented).
reward_terms: +w_child_dx * max(0, prev_abs_child_dx - cur_abs_child_dx) bounded by child_cap
anti_shortcuts: Activating this skill before actually reaching the top tier.

selection_rules: If any hazard activation condition holds AND a safe punch/sidestep exists, run avoid_hazards but bias action choice to also respect current traversal direction.
If climb_ladder recently signaled near_ladder_top, run dismount_and_replan until target ladder overlap drops below overlap_frac.
Else if player has x-overlap fraction with target ladder >= overlap_frac and ladder_top_y[target] < player_y - min_top_above, run climb_ladder.
Else if a target ladder is set and not yet aligned, run traverse_to_ladder.
Else if no target ladder set, run select_reachable_ladder using reach_y_tol on player_feet_y vs ladder_bottom_y.
If on the child's tier with no upward ladder reachable, run approach_child.
skill_selector.fallback_behavior: If no skill applies (e.g., between platforms during a jump), issue NOOP and re-evaluate next step; never default to holding UP.

dense_reward_design.composition_rule: shaped = clip(sum_k active_k * w_k * term_k, -R_MAX, R_MAX) where active_k is 1 only for the currently selected skill plus avoid_hazards; final objective = real_env_reward + lambda_shape * shaped with lambda_shape small.
must_include: Bounded upward-progress term based on decrease in player_y while climb_ladder is active.
Bounded horizontal-alignment term toward the selected target ladder's center_x while traverse_to_ladder is active.
Reach-y validity term that penalizes selecting a ladder whose bottom is not near player_feet_y.
Dismount term that rewards leaving the ladder column near its top onto a higher platform.
must_not_include: Raw Euclidean distance to child as the primary signal.
Unbounded fruit-collection bonuses that incentivize ignoring upward progress.
Per-step FIRE rewards that don't require a monkey in range (punch farming).
Rewards for any tiny 1-pixel x-overlap with a ladder.
dense_reward_design.real_reward_relationship: Shaped terms are auxiliary and must remain small relative to real environment reward. They encode the documented stable-200 contract (approach + valid punch + first ladder) and add post-200 progress signals (dismount, next-ladder selection, climb on higher platforms) so CMA-ES can extend beyond 200 without erasing the first-reward route.

alignment_risks: Punch-farming lower-platform monkeys for high score with zero UP actions.
Treating 1-pixel ladder x-overlap as 'on ladder' and issuing UP off-platform, causing falls.
Selecting the nearest ladder by x at start, picking the higher-platform ladder near x=20.
Oscillating between LEFT and RIGHT near start, never climbing.
Holding UP every step, gaining nothing and losing a life.
Over-aggressive post-200 rewrites that disrupt the working first-reward route.
Reward hacking via repeated re-entry of the same ladder to harvest climb reward.
implementation_notes: Compute player_feet_y = player_y + player_h and ladder_bottom_y = ladder_y + ladder_h before any reach test.
Implement x_overlap_fraction(player, ladder) = max(0, min(px+pw, lx+lw) - max(px, lx)) / max(1, min(pw, lw)) and require >= overlap_frac (e.g., 0.4-0.5) before climbing.
Persist the chosen target ladder index across steps; only clear it on dismount or when the reach-y test fails.
Preserve a clearly gated RIGHTFIRE branch when monkey_threat_in_facing_direction holds near the start to keep the stable-200 baseline.
Avoid_hazards should override action choice but not change the active navigation skill, so the policy resumes climbing/traversing after the hazard clears.
Keep all candidate_parameters as a flat numeric vector for CMA-ES; do not let the LLM hard-code level-specific x/y constants beyond initial means.
Bound every shaped term per step (e.g., clipped to [-1, 1]) so CMA-ES cannot exploit unbounded shaping.
Treat ladder selection, climb gating, and dismount as three separable parameter groups; tune them in this order if staged optimization is used.
